## Summary
> Description here
 
## Evidence
 
> Screenshots, videos, logs, or API request/response samples
 
## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Issue
- [ ] Refactor
 
## Checklists
 
### Security
- [ ] Security impact of change has been considered
- [ ] Backwards compatibility has been checked, if applicable (migrations, API contract)
 
### General
 
- [ ] Pull request has a descriptive title and context useful to a reviewer.
- [ ] Pull request linked to task tracker where applicable
- [ ] Videos or Image evidence clearly show the developed functionality
- [ ] Developer has auto reviewed the pulled request
- [ ] Tags have been added if applicable (migration, log migration, etc)
- [ ] Branch name follows convention ({version}/{sprint}/{workItemType}/{workItemNumber})
- [ ] Changes have been reviewed by at least one other contributor
 
---
*Serenity Star - Pull Request Template v.1 [2026-05-08]*
---
